raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pehz nehnie tas Kalps def-
mits Kameetus / no fawa Kunga
Kameeteem/ nn atsgahje/ un wiſ-
fada Manta fawa Kunga / bij
wiſna Rohfá/ un wiſsch zehlehs/
un gabje uhs Mesopotamiju/uhs
Naöra Pilsfahtu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad liſke wiſsch tohß Ka-
neetus apmestees ahra / preeſch
a Pilsfahta/pre weenas Uhdens-
ffas/ap Wakkara Laiku/tai Lai-
á/kad tahs Sinehlejas ahra nah-
/un wiſsch fazzija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "KUNGS / tu DEews
anna Kunga Ahbrääma / fa-
obpi man fehodeen / un darri
Schchlastibu pee manna Kunga
hbrääma.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Reds/ es stahwu pee tahs
odens Afkas/ un fcha Pilsfahta
uschu Meitas ees ahra / Uyde-
finelt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad lai noteek/ ka ta jan-
Meita/us ko es fazzischu / pa-
of jelle tawn Trauku / ka es
t warru / un ta fazzihß/ dserr/
awns Kameetus arridsan dsir-
aschu/ ta patti (effoti)/ fo tu
oam Kalpain Jhsääkam no-
lejis / un ka es pee ta atsiht
ru/ka tu Upschehlofchanu pa-
tijis effi mannam Kungan.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas notikke/ pirms tas
abeidſis runnaht/ rangi/tad
fe Rebekka ahra/ kas bij dsun-
i Betnëtam / Milkas tahs
ra Seewas / Ahbrääma
hta Dehlan/ un tai bij wiſ-
Trauks wirs fanweem Ka-
heem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tai Meitinať bij fohti
kaists Waigs/ta bij weena Jum-
prawa/ un ne weens Wihrs bij to
atsinnis/ ta nokahpe Akta/ un pil-
dija fawu Trauku / un uskahpe
atkak.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad tezzeja tas Kalps wiſ-
nai pretti / un fazzija : lai es jelle
kahdu Uhdens Malzinu no tawa
Trauka nodserrohs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ta fazzija : Dserr/mans
Kungs/ un ta steidsahs/ un nolaide
to Trauku us fawu Rohfu / un
dsirdija winnu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kad ta bij pabeigufi
winnu dsirdinaht / fazzija ta : es
finelfchu arridsan preeſch taweem
Kameeteem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ta steidsahs / un iſlehje
fawu Trauku dsirdijama Sillē/
un tezzeja atkat us Akku finelt: un
finehle wiſſeem wiſza Kameeteem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Wihrs isfabrihni-
jahs pahr tahs/ kluffu zeesdains/
ka wiſsch fajustu / arrig tas
KUNGS / winna Zelfam lizzis
labbi isdohtees / jeb ne.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kad tee Kameeti bij no-
dsehrufschees/tad nehme tasWihrs
weenu felta Peeres-Sprahdsī / ta
fwehre weenu puſsSihkeli/un di-
wt apleekamus Rohku - Gredse-
nus / pee wiſnas Rohkahm/ tee
fwehre definitis Sihketus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiſsch fazzija : Mei-
tixa / kurras Meita tu effi ? pa-
fakfi man jelle to / Irrag preeſch
muns tawa Tehwa Namina
Weetas/ tur Nakts-Mahju dab-
buht ?
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
